config.recruitKey.name: Recruit/Dismiss Key
config.recruitKey.description: The main action key to use when recruiting or dismissing NPCs
config.manualTaskKey.name: Manual Command Key
config.manualTaskKey.description: Press this key while aiming at an object to command a squad member to interact with it.
config.useSquadInventory.name: Use Squad Inventory
config.useSquadInventory.description: When NPCs gather items, they will place it on a special Squad Inventory. If disabled, they will put it directly in the player's inventory if possible.
config.openSquadInventoryKey.name: Open Squad Inventory Key
config.openSquadInventoryKey.description: The key used to open the shared squad inventory.
config.tasksToggleKey.name: Toggle Tasks Key
config.tasksToggleKey.description: Press this key to toggle whether squad members perform tasks or only follow you.
config.friendshipRequirement.name: Friendship Requirement
config.friendshipRequirement.description: The number of hearts required to recruit an NPC. Spouses can always be recruited.
config.friendshipPointsPerHour.name: Friendship Gain Per Hour
config.friendshipPointsPerHour.descripti: The amount of friendship gained for each in-game hour spent with a recruited squad member.
config.maxSquadSize.name: Max Squad Size
config.maxSquadSize.description: The maximum number of followers you can have in your squad at one time. Be warned that increasing this number will make the mod overpowered (and may come to a performance cost at some point)!
config.recruitAllNpcs.name: Recruit Any NPC
config.recruitAllNpcs.description: If enabled, allows recruiting any NPC, not just friendable ones. WARNING: This may cause unexpected behavior with certain NPCs.
config.disableInteraction.name: Disable Squad Member Interaction
config.disableInteraction.description: Sets when talking to or gifting squad members should be prevented.
config.disableTrashRummagingReaction.des: Sets which squad members should not react negatively when you dig through trash cans.
config.enableCommunication.name: Enable Ambient Dialogue
config.enableCommunication.description: If enabled, squad members will show dialogue bubbles or make sounds.
config.dialogueCooldownSeconds.name: Dialogue Cooldown (seconds)
config.dialogueCooldownSeconds.descripti: The minimum time in seconds between dialogue bubbles for each squad member. Set to 0 to disable cooldown.
config.enableIdleAnimations.name: Enable Idle Animations
config.enableIdleAnimations.description: If enabled, squad members will perform idle animations when standing still while following you.
config.enableGathering.name: Auto-Gather Debris
config.enableGathering.description: If enabled, squad members will automatically pick up loose items and debris from the ground.
config.enabledTasks.name: Task Modes
config.attackingMode.name: Attacking
config.attackingMode.description: How squad members attack: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you fight), or Autonomous (automatically attack nearby monsters).
config.harvestingMode.name: Harvesting
config.harvestingMode.description: How squad members harvest: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you harvest), or Autonomous (automatically harvest nearby mature crops).
config.protectBeehouseFlowers.name: Protect Beehouse Flowers
config.protectBeehouseFlowers.descriptio: Number of tiles around beehouses where flowers are protected from harvesting. Set to 0 to disable protection. Default is 5.
config.foragingMode.name: Foraging
config.foragingMode.description: How squad members forage: Disabled (never) or Autonomous (automatically pick up forage items).
config.lumberingMode.name: Lumbering
config.lumberingMode.description: How squad members chop: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you chop), or Autonomous (automatically clear twigs, chop trees when you do).
config.miningMode.name: Mining
config.miningMode.description: How squad members mine: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you mine), or Autonomous (automatically break nearby rocks).
config.wateringMode.name: Watering
config.wateringMode.description: How squad members water crops: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you water), or Autonomous (automatically water dry soil).
config.fishingMode.name: Fishing
config.fishingMode.description: How squad members fish: Disabled (never) or Mimicking (only when you fish).
config.pettingMode.name: Petting
config.pettingMode.description: How squad members pet animals: Disabled (never), Mimicking (only when you're petting animals), or Autonomous (automatically pet unpetted animals).
config.enableSitting.name: Enable Sitting
config.enableSitting.description: If enabled, squad members will sit on furniture when you do.
config.enableSittingLegRendering.name: (EXPERIMENTAL) Enable Sitting Leg Rendering
config.enableSittingLegRendering.descrip: If enabled, NPCs will use leg sprite manipulation when sitting (legs rotated for side views, sprite trimmed for proper positioning). Looks pretty hacky, but I'm putting it out here to try.
commands.noFollower: You have no one in your squad to command.
recruitment.onlyOneFollower: You can only have one follower at a time.
recruitment.festival_block: You cannot recruit NPCs during a festival.
squad.inventory.title: Squad Inventory
